title: Portfolio A/B Testing Platform
description: Developed a frontend website for evaluating landing pages with A/B testing.  Users can create multiple variants by modifying titles, colors, and CTA buttons. The system tracks views, clicks, and calculates CTR for each variant..

title: AI QA Automation System
description: Developed a full-stack web application for automated testing of AI-generated responses. Implemented session and bug management, test case tracking, and analytics dashboards. Integrated Supabase backend with serverless functions and a React + Tailwind frontend, including real-time data updates and AI response generation using OpenAI APIs.

title: Beach Point Reservations system
description: A volleyball reservations system created using modern technologies, as React, Tailwind and Python for the backend, followed best practices and design patterns

title: Langara groups app
description: Cross-platform (iOS/Android) social media app using React Native and Supabase for Langara College, enabling student groups to connect through group discovery, real-time chat, and an integrated e-commerce feature.
